vulnerability.reference: High dependence on mobile AI assistants for time-sensitive decisions with no fallback or error-checking mechanisms.
vulnerability.generated: Resource-limited mobile devices demand aggressive quantization, yet real-time AI applications lack tolerance for per-state-group prediction instability.

impact.reference: Erroneous health, navigation, or communication advice causing user harm and eroding trust in mobile AI services.
impact.generated: Consumers receive erratic, unreliable assistant outputs during real-time use, causing misinformed decisions and degraded user trust.

dose_response.reference: Post-training quantization of SSM weights and activations induces per-state-group approximation distortion, which in mixed-precision activation quantization on mobile devices exposes consumers to unstable predictions, leading to erroneous advice and user harm.
dose_response.generated: Post-training quantization induces per-state-group distortion, which, through consumers using mobile AI assistants, triggers aggressive quantization demands and real-time intolerance to instability, leading to erratic outputs, misinformed decisions, and degraded user trust.
